ui.main.title: Chess Roguelike
ui.main.subtitle: A roguelike RPG built on chess rules
ui.main.rules_body:
You and the enemy alternate moving chess pieces.
Capture the enemy king to clear the round.
Choose one of three upgrades after each round.
Enemies grow stronger every round.
If your king falls, the run ends.
Clear all 5 rounds to win.
ui.main.resume_ready: Your previous run is ready to continue
